description: Style Note adidas helps you avoid discomfort and keep dry and comfortable all day long. These T-shirts also offer you a stylised look that is most flattering on your day off. Pair it with a pair of jeans and sports shoes on your day off. Product Details Blue T-shirt, has a round neckline, short sleeves, graphic print in front and branding in the graphic print Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
